events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a wire labels vs. loop drawing mismatch during a DOC (document) compare at the rough-complete stage of loop checks & wiring. This is a documentation/labeling non-compliance issue. The wire labels don't match the loop drawings, which means the work is non-compliant and potentially defective (installed but with incorrect labeling). This could lead to wiring errors, safety issues during commissioning, etc.

Decision: fail (non-compliant)
Risk: medium (labeling mismatch could cause miswiring, but it's caught at rough-complete stage before energization)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 85-90% (roughed in but not closed out)
Confidence: high, say 0.9
Findings: wire labels do not match loop drawing designations
Actions: correct wire labels to match loop drawings, re-perform DOC compare
Rationale: wire labeling must match loop drawings per ISA 5.1 and engineered drawings; mismatch is non-compliant and risks misidentification during loop checks/commissioning
References: loop drawings, ISA 5.1
